document.title: EC Certificate According to Annex II of the Directive 93/42/EEC on Medical Devices
document.documentType: EC Certificate; Full Quality Assurance System

sourceSummary.oneLine: EC certificate for IMFOU CO., LTD.'s feel-DRCS radiological image processing system under Directive 93/42/EEC.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to evidence a full quality assurance system certificate issued by Szutest, Notified Body 2195, for the listed medical device product.
keyPoints: Manufacturer is IMFOU CO., LTD., Republic of Korea.
Product is a Radiological Image Processing System, model feel-DRCS.
Quality assurance system is declared according to Annex II excluding section 4, Section 3 of Directive 93/42/EEC.
Approved quality system is subject to surveillance pursuant to Annex II, Section 5 and unannounced audits.

entities.name: Szutest
entities.evidence: Szutest, Notified Body 2195, declares that the aforementioned manufacturer has implemented a quality assurance system

entities.name: Directive 93/42/EEC on Medical Devices
entities.evidence: According to Annex ll of the Directive 93l42lEEG on Medical Devices

concepts.name: Annex II quality assurance assessment
concepts.evidence: according to Annex ll (excluding section 4), Section 3 of the directive 93l42lEEC on medical devices

concepts.name: Surveillance and unannounced audits
concepts.evidence: The approved quality system is subject to surveillance pursuant to Annex ll, Section 5 of Directive 93l42lEEC and unannounced audits.

concepts.name: Significant changes notification
concepts.evidence: Szutest must be informed of any significant changes in the design and/or construction of the product(s).

evidence.claim: The document is an EC Certificate for a full quality assurance system.
evidence.evidenceText: EC CERTIFICATE According to Annex ll of the Directive 93l42lEEG on Medical Devices Full Quality Assurance System

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is IMFOU CO., LTD. in Seoul, Republic of Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer: IMFOU CO., LTD, Room No. 1 105, Daerung Post Tower 7th, 48, Digital-ro 33-gil, Guro-gu, Seoul, Republic of KOREA

evidence.claim: The listed product is a Radiological Image Processing System, feel-DRCS.
Reference reports are MM0253-P006-R01 and MM0253-P006-R02.
Szutest, Notified Body 2195, declared implementation of a quality assurance system under Annex II excluding section 4, Section 3 of Directive 93/42/EEC.
evidence.evidenceText: Szutest, Notified Body 2195, declares that the aforementioned manufacturer has implemented a quality assurance system according to Annex ll (excluding section 4), Section 3 of the directive 93l42lEEC on medical devices.

evidence.claim: The approved quality system is subject to surveillance and unannounced audits.
evidence.evidenceText: The approved quality system is subject to surveillance pursuant to Annex ll, Section 5 of Directive 93l42lEEC and unannounced audits.

evidence.claim: Szutest must be informed of significant changes in product design or construction.
evidence.evidenceText: Szutest must be informed of any significant changes in the design and/or construction of the product(s).
This EC certificate is valid till 2024-05-26.

evidence.claim: The issue date is 2013-03-20, revision number is 05 Recertification, and revision date is 2020-04-29.
evidence.evidenceText: lssue Date: Revision No.: Revision Date: 2013-03-20 05 Recertification 2020-04-29

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the source text identifies an EC certificate under Directive 93/42/EEC issued by Szutest, Notified Body 2195.
OCR quality issues are present, including apparent substitutions such as '93l42lEEG', '93l42lEEC', 'Annex ll', and 'reskicted'.
Product and model labels are visually ambiguous in the extracted text, but 'feel-DRCS' appears immediately after 'Radiological Image Processing System' and before Product(s)/Model(s) labels.
